prerequisites: A Systeme.io account with access to profile settings.
A Public API key generated in the Systeme.io dashboard (Settings > Public API keys), supplied as the connector's api_key field.
Network access to the Systeme.io API at https://api.systeme.io/api/.

authMethods.name: API key (X-API-Key header)
authMethods.summary: Systeme.io authenticates every request with an API key sent in the X-API-Key HTTP header. Provide this value in the connector's required api_key secret field. Generate the key from the Public API keys section of your Systeme.io profile settings.

setupSteps.title: Generate a Public API key
setupSteps.body: Sign in to Systeme.io, open your profile settings in the dashboard, and generate a new key under the Public API keys section. Copy the key value, since it is used to authenticate all API requests.

setupSteps.title: Provide the API key to the connector
setupSteps.body: Enter the generated key into the connector's required api_key field. The connector sends it in the X-API-Key header on each request to https://api.systeme.io/api/.

setupSteps.title: Verify access
setupSteps.body: Confirm the key is active by running the connector; it calls the Systeme.io Public API (for example the contacts collection) to read your data. If requests are rejected, regenerate the key in the Public API keys section and update the api_key field.

sources.title: Systeme.io API recipes and how to use them
